channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NSW Labor conference challenges party's direction as migrant communities' political loyalties shift
item.description: The NSW Labor conference has sparked debate by resisting the party's inaction on key promises, highlighting a growing disconnect between the government and rank-and-file members. This shift reflects a...

item.title: Rob Reiner's HBO Sketch Criticizes Trump's Potential Third Term in Larry David's Comedy
item.description: In a satirical HBO comedy episode titled 'Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness: An Almost History of America,' late filmmaker Rob Reiner portrayed George Washington to critique former President ...

item.title: DeepSeek's strategic shift into semiconductor development amid China's tech competition
item.description: Chinese startup DeepSeek is reportedly developing its own AI inference chip, marking a significant strategic shift from its previous focus on AI model breakthroughs. The chip, designed for inference t...

item.title: Vice President, Governor Arlekar and Chief Minister Vijay honour social reformer Rettamalai Srinivasan; CM also announces relief for Panruti road accident victims
item.description: Vice President C.P. Radhakrishnan, Tamil Nadu Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar and Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay paid tributes to noted social reformer Rettamalai Srinivasan on the occasion of hi...

item.title: Government Streamlines Passport Home Delivery for Overseas Pakistanis
item.description: The federal government is taking steps to enhance passport home delivery services for overseas Pakistanis, aiming to make the process faster, easier, and more reliable. A high-level meeting chaired by...

item.title: Nigerian Army Honours Wounded Soldiers With Special Luncheon In Borno
item.description: The Nigerian Army held a special luncheon at the 7 Division Medical Services and Hospital in Maiduguri, Borno State, to honour soldiers injured during counter-terrorism operations. The event, part of ...

item.title: Tanzania and France Strengthen Economic Ties Through Business Delegation Visit
item.description: Tanzania has welcomed a French business delegation to explore investment opportunities and deepen economic ties with France. The visit highlights Tanzania's efforts to attract foreign direct investmen...

item.title: Trump Struggles with Press Conference Questions During Meeting with Erdogan
item.description: During a press conference in Turkey, U.S. President Donald Trump faced difficulties understanding and responding to questions from reporters. The event occurred during a bilateral meeting with Turkish...

item.title: Gauteng High Court Ruling Clarifies Provincial Responsibility for Healthcare Access
item.description: The article discusses a landmark legal ruling in Gauteng, South Africa, where the High Court clarified that the provincial government retains oversight responsibility for healthcare access despite ser...

item.title: Legacy of Integrity: Dora Akunyili's Impact on Nigerian Public Service
item.description: The article discusses the enduring legacy of Prof. Dora Akunyili, Nigeria's late NAFDAC Director-General, celebrated for her relentless fight against counterfeit drugs. Her son, Edozie, shares how her...

item.title: NATO unveils $40 billion defense spending boost ahead of Trump summit
item.description: NATO leaders announced significant arms deals worth tens of billions of dollars during a defense forum in Ankara, emphasizing the need for increased European defense spending ahead of a summit with Pr...

item.title: Montreal Arsonist's Claims of Ignorance Spark Legal and Community Concerns
item.description: Mohamed Ilyes Akodad, a 21-year-old Montreal resident, pleaded guilty to firebombing a synagogue and Jewish community centre but claimed he had no knowledge the targets were Jewish institutions. His l...

item.title: US Cyber Agency Uses AI Model to Find Security Vulnerabilities in Government Code
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is reportedly utilizing Anthropic's Mythos model to scan government code repositories for security vulnerabilities. According to source...

item.title: Marya Prude Shares Emotional Story of Discovering Letter from Ivy Namu About Her Late Child
item.description: Marya Prude, a Kenyan media personality, has opened up about discovering a letter addressed to her late child from Ivy Namu, the current partner of her ex-husband Willis Raburu. During an interview wi...

item.title: Kerala Minister Attributes Wayanad Landslide to Tunnel Project Activities
item.description: A major landslide struck Kerala's Wayanad district, killing one person and injuring seven. State agriculture minister T Siddique blamed the disaster on unscientific dumping of excavated soil from the ...

item.title: Escudero affirms Senate impeachment court ruling requiring 16 votes to convict Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: Senate impeachment court presiding officer Senator Francis “Chiz” Escudero reaffirmed his ruling that Vice President Sara Duterte may only be convicted in her impeachment trial if at least 16 senator-...

item.title: USA eliminated by Belgium in World Cup exit after 4-1 loss to co-hosts in Seattle
item.description: The United States' FIFA World Cup campaign ended in a heavy defeat after losing 4-1 to Belgium in the Round of 16, marking an abrupt end to their hopes of a deep run on home soil. Despite advancing co...

item.title: Jacqui Chan's Career and Relationship with Anthony Armstrong-Jones
item.description: This article explores the life and career of Trinidad-born British actress Jacqui Chan, focusing on her 1956 encounter with photographer Anthony Armstrong-Jones in Venice. Chan, then 18, was a dancer ...

item.title: Cleophas Malala Threatens to Leave Coalition if Sifuna Is Overlooked
item.description: Cleophas Malala, deputy leader of the Democracy for Citizens Party, has hinted at leaving the United Opposition if Senator Edwin Sifuna is not given a key position. Malala emphasized the need for Luhy...

item.title: Windsor Police Locate Missing Woman After Search
item.description: Windsor police have successfully located a woman who was reported missing earlier this week. The incident, which has been widely covered in local media, highlights the importance of community cooperat...
